//: F# 15.9 servicing branch — modern host SDK pinned to match Roslyn dev15.9.x.

DO NOT remove init-tools.cmd, BuildToolsVersion.txt, DotnetCLIVersion.txt, DotnetCLIToolsVersion.txt — those install the legacy CLIs (1.0.0-preview3-003886 + 2.1.300) needed for project.json restore. SDK 2.1.526 cannot restore project.json. See Constraint 11 in plan.md.
//-msbuild-sdks: Required by VS 2017 NuGetSdkResolver to find Microsoft.NET.Sdk. Without this, vsintegration .csproj files (Vsix, ItemTemplates, PEVerify) fail with 'The NuGetSdkResolver did not resolve this SDK because there was no version specified'. The version string here matches what dnceng myget-legacy hosts.
